high.title: visual-pacing-5s violations inside the new Scene 5
high.detail:
Killer-row entrance cadence is paced to narration word anchors but four consecutive gaps exceed the 5.0s rule because the per-stage narration beat is ~7s. Gaps measured between consecutive meaningful entrances (skull/pulse decorations excluded per rule):
  - 59.02 (#p5-conseq-1) -> 64.54 (#p5-row-2) = 5.52s
  - 66.45 (#p5-conseq-2) -> 72.96 (#p5-row-3) = 6.51s
  - 74.16 (#p5-conseq-3) -> 80.20 (#p5-row-4) = 6.04s
  - 81.20 (#p5-conseq-4) -> 88.11 (#p5-wrap-line) = 6.91s
high.recommended_fix: Add a marker-sweep beat (e.g., sweeping color underline on the killer-name) at the midpoint of each gap. Suggested anchors: 61.7 (between row-1 and row-2), 69.7 (between row-2 and row-3), 77.0 (between row-3 and row-4), 84.5 (between row-4 and wrap-line). Each marker is purely decorative on existing geometry and does NOT compete with the screenshot-anchor-markers rule (no chart screenshots involved).

medium.title: Pre-existing 6.08s gap inside Phase 3
medium.detail: 20.50 (#p3-quote .quote-bottom) -> 25.55 (scale-pulse on author-name, decorative, doesn't count) -> 26.58 (#p3-cta). Real meaningful-content gap is 20.50 -> 26.58 = 6.08s.
medium.recommended_fix: Insert a marker-sweep beat under the quote-text at ~23.0s ('Instagram' phrase). Not a regression - same root cause as 8-scene review.

medium.title: Pre-existing 5.58s gap inside Phase 6
medium.detail: 94.32 (#p6-pagepill) -> 99.90 (#p6-col-chat) = 5.58s static window. Was 5.29s in 8-scene version; widened slightly due to phase boundary shift.
medium.recommended_fix: Skeleton-reveal the 3 empty column containers at t=96.5 (border only, icons hidden), then ramp opacity at each column's word anchor (99.90 / 101.40 / 103.48).

medium.title: Phase 4 51.80 scale-pulse decoration doesn't satisfy 5s rule per spec
medium.detail: Same as 8-scene review T-007. Replace pulse with a marker-underline beat at t=51.80.

sfx_alignment.notes: All 8 cinematic-whoosh cues fire at exact T2/T3/T4/T5/T6/T7/T8/T9 (2.81, 15.83, 28.72, 55.40, 93.27, 106.91, 120.93, 133.40). Renumber preserved alignment; new T5=55.40 whoosh added at exact phase boundary. data-duration=1.5 on all whooshes per audio-design.md rule. data-volume=0.11 (within cap). Decision-table cues (57.37, 64.54, 72.96, 80.20) align with each killer-row entrance (drift <0.05s).

thumbnail_holds.notes: Terminal hold improved 1.18s -> 1.72s vs 8-scene version. Last meaningful entrance #p9-subscribe at 141.50, composition end 143.22. cta-question textShadow yoyo (135.10 + 7 repeats * 0.5*2 ends 142.10) settles 1.12s before end.
